title: Melicope wailauensis
taxonomy: Melicope wailauensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It belongs to the genus Melicope, which is a group of tropical and subtropical plants native to Hawaii, Southeast Asia, and the Pacific Islands. Melicope wailauensis is specifically found in Hawaii and is known for its unique characteristics and adaptations to its native habitat. The classification of Melicope wailauensis includes its botanical name, which is used to identify and distinguish it from other plant species. Further classification may include its family, genus, species, and other taxonomic categories.
